title: }
content:
}
```
Then disable one provider’s inline suggestions at a time (settings or extension command palette).

**Reduce Background Churn**
- Disable auto-refresh/telemetry where possible:
- `"editor.aiStats.enabled": false`
- Turn off any experimental share features not needed: `"workbench.experimental.share.enabled": false`
- Remove duplicate old versions of Pylance / debugpy folders (safe cleanup already outlined).

**Neovim Stability While Keeping AI**
In `init.lua` (outside workspace):
```lua
if vim.g.vscode then
-- Keep only lightweight VSCode-specific mappings
end
```
Disable heavy Neovim plugins that duplicate AI (e.g., cmp copilot) to avoid double suggestion overlay.

**Quick Commands To Toggle AI Without Uninstall**
```bash
# Disable (instead of uninstall) one extension temporarily
code-insiders --disable-extension openai.chatgpt
code-insiders --enable-extension openai.chatgpt
```
